case_title: ETZLER, RAY et al vs. FRIEDMAN, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ETZLER, RAY KIELY, DAVID F. KAZANJIAN, BRIAN RAFFI MASON, JEFFREY LUCERO, EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, DAVID DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, DAVID
DEFT DID NOT HAVE JURY INSTRUCTIONS AT SETTLEMENT CONF IN DEPT 7. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN BY COURT.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, DAVID ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JAN-30-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1355 HARRISON, STAYED UNTIL FEB-27-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS.
